response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior/staff full-stack engineer with strong craftsmanship, testing discipline, and broad polyglot experience, but the role requires a Director-level IC (Principal Engineer) with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. The resume shows ~14-17 years depending on counting, but no demonstrated AI/ML platform leadership, no shipped AI products, no advanced AI degree, and no evidence of advising strategic customers on cloud/AI adoption at the scale this role demands. AI exposure is limited to recent MCP/agent tooling contributions at current employer.
strengths: Long polyglot engineering track record across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backends
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open-source contributions
Founder of GISCollective demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative and long-term product ownership
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI/ML products — only recent MCP tooling exposure
No evidence of Director-level IC influence, customer advisory, or strategic technical leadership
No advanced degree in AI and limited cloud-platform depth (AWS CDK mentioned only briefly)

key_factors.factor: Lack of demonstrated AI platform expertise
No Principal/Director-level IC strategic leadership history
